name: South Korea
authority: Financial Services Commission (FSC) / Korea Financial Intelligence Unit (KoFIU)

unhostedWallets.notes: Transfers above KRW 1,000,000 to unhosted wallets are restricted. Real-name bank account verification (실명계좌) required.

rules.notes: Travel rule under the Specific Financial Information Act, effective March 25, 2022. The Virtual Asset User Protection Act (VAUPA, July 19, 2024) addresses user protection and VASP supervision but is a separate instrument from the travel rule.
